scenario.name: cisco_dnd_publish
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/TCP [local_ip]:[local_port];rport;branch=[branch] From: <sip:1050@[remote_ip]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:1050@[remote_ip]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 REGISTER User-Agent: Cisco-CP8865/12.1.1 Max-Forwards: 70 Contact: <sip:1050@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=tcp>;+sip.instance="<urn:uuid:00000000-0000-0000-0000-aabbccddee50>";reg-id=1 Expires: 3600 Content-Length: 0

REGISTER sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/TCP [local_ip]:[local_port];rport;branch=[branch] From: <sip:1050@[remote_ip]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:1050@[remote_ip]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 REGISTER User-Agent: Cisco-CP8865/12.1.1 Max-Forwards: 70 Contact: <sip:1050@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=tcp>;+sip.instance="<urn:uuid:00000000-0000-0000-0000-aabbccddee50>";reg-id=1 [authentication username=1050 password=ci-no-secret] Expires: 3600 Content-Length: 0

PUBLISH sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/TCP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:aabbccddee50@[remote_ip]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:aabbccddee50@[remote_ip]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 3 PUBLISH Contact: <sip:aabbccddee50@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=tcp> User-Agent: Cisco-CP8865/12.1.1 Event: presence Expires: 3600 Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Type: application/pidf+xml Content-Length: [len]
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <presence xmlns="urn:ietf:params:xml:ns:pidf" xmlns:dm="urn:ietf:params:xml:ns:pidf:data-model" xmlns:e="urn:ietf:params:xml:ns:pidf:status:rpid" xmlns:ce="urn:cisco:params:xml:ns:pidf:rpid" entity="sip:aabbccddee50"> <dm:person> <e:activities> <ce:dnd/> </e:activities> </dm:person> </presence>

PUBLISH sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/TCP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:aabbccddee50@[remote_ip]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:aabbccddee50@[remote_ip]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 4 PUBLISH Contact: <sip:aabbccddee50@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=tcp> User-Agent: Cisco-CP8865/12.1.1 Event: presence Expires: 3600 Max-Forwards: 70 [authentication username=1050 password=ci-no-secret] Content-Type: application/pidf+xml Content-Length: [len]
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <presence xmlns="urn:ietf:params:xml:ns:pidf" xmlns:dm="urn:ietf:params:xml:ns:pidf:data-model" xmlns:e="urn:ietf:params:xml:ns:pidf:status:rpid" xmlns:ce="urn:cisco:params:xml:ns:pidf:rpid" entity="sip:aabbccddee50"> <dm:person> <e:activities> <ce:dnd/> </e:activities> </dm:person> </presence>
